description: Copper Point of Sale is open on the Windows desktop showing the main POS register screen. The system has some existing customers from real sample data. Add a new customer to the system with the following details: First Name: 'Maria', Last Name: 'Rodriguez', Email: 'maria.rodriguez@email.com', Phone: '(555) 867-5309', and Address: '742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, IL 62704'. Ensure the record is saved and appears in the customer list.
